title: verific: Fixes incorrect aldff inference in verific importer

features.name: register with enable using conditional operator in always block
features.description: Code should include a register declaration with a conditional assignment in a clocked always block where the enable signal uses the ternary conditional operator to select between new data and the register's current value

features.name: pipeline register with enable and output assignment
features.description: Code should include a pipeline register architecture where a register with enable feeds an output via continuous assignment, triggering incorrect aldff inference when imported through verific
